'''Osa-Prime''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] city of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Osarian]]. During the [[Osarian-Rhommamool conflict]], [[Nom Anor]] ordered a missile strike against the city when the orbits of Osarian and [[Rhommamool/Legends|Rhommamool]] were at their closest, destroying the city and causing the political conflict to escalate into a state of war.<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime" />

{{City-stub}}
